chunks.text: Technical Reports - Yi Ma. RLIF: Interactive Imitation Learning as Reinforcement Learning (EECS-2024-17) by Jianlan Luo, Perry Dong, Simon Zhai, Yi Ma and Sergey Levine.
chunks.question: What is the title and authors of the 2024 technical report?
chunks.answer: RLIF: Interactive Imitation Learning as Reinforcement Learning by Jianlan Luo, Perry Dong, Simon Zhai, Yi Ma, Sergey Levine.

chunks.text: Incremental Learning via Rate Reduction (EECS-2021-130) by Kyung Eun Baek.
chunks.question: Who authored the 2021 technical report on incremental learning?

chunks.text: Interpolation Learning (EECS-2021-51) by Zitong Yang, Yi Ma and Jacob Steinhardt.
chunks.question: What is the title and authors of the 2021 interpolation learning report?
chunks.answer: Interpolation Learning by Zitong Yang, Yi Ma, Jacob Steinhardt.
